Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to construct an accepting Petri net modeling the insurance claim management process described We will use pm4pys PetriNet Marking and petri_utils

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: if documents are incomplete after Document Verification DV a re submission of documents step occurs Re Document Submission RDS before the process continues That suggests after DV if incomplete we go to RDS then presumably back to DV again for verification So loop DV to RDS to DV

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: if the Fraud Check FC raises doubts an additional In depth Investigation II is performed This can happen multiple times before proceeding to Claim Assessment CA So FC to II to FC loop possibly multiple times then proceed to CA

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: after CA either we go directly to Payment or if threshold exceeded go to Approval then Payment

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: That implies that for claims below threshold no approval needed they go straight to Payment

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: we can model after CA either go to AP then P or directly to P

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: In Petri nets decisions are represented by having a transition fire depending on conditions we can have two transitions after a place one for need approval and one for no approval

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: we can just have a transition Skip Approval or simply have an immediate transition In typical process modeling you would have a gateway In Petri nets you can have a silent transition label None representing a skip

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The process begins with CR So we can have a start place with a token and then a transition Claim Registration that consumes the token and moves forward

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: after Closure CL we reach a sink place with a token That is final marking

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Typically we can model each activity as a transition with input place before and output place after

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: after DV we have a place Then two transitions one to FC if complete and one to RDS if incomplete RDS then leads back to DV input So that is a classic loop

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: for FC have place before FC and place after FC Then from after FC either go to CA if no doubts or go to II if doubts II then produces token back to before FC

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: after CA we have a decision for approval with AP and a silent skip transition both leading to before Payment

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Thus define transitions CR DV FC CA AP P N CL RDS II plus a silent transition for complete docs and a silent transition for skip approval

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: The simplest is after DV have a place after_dv then two transitions one silent complete branch to before_fc and one RDS back to after_cr

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: If we have both FC and RDS as transitions from after_dv then after II we would need to put token back to after_dv which would also enable RDS again That is not desired So we need a dedicated before_fc place

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Our solution with a silent transition is acceptable because the problem does not forbid silent transitions and they are common in Petri nets

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Places start after_cr after_dv before_fc after_fc after_ca before_payment after_payment after_notification end

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Transitions Claim Registration Document Verification Re Document Submission Fraud Check In depth Investigation Claim Assessment Approval Payment Notification Closure plus silent transitions t_dv_complete and skip_approval

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Flow start to CR to after_cr to DV to after_dv then either complete docs to before_fc or RDS back to after_cr then before_fc to FC to after_fc then either II back to before_fc or CA to after_ca then either AP or skip approval to before_payment then Payment then Notification then Closure then end

Name: Validation - PE
Text: one possible path start to CR to DV to complete docs to FC to CA to skip approval to Payment to Notification to Closure to end That is a valid path

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Another path with RDS and another with II are also valid so the loops can cycle multiple times

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: initial marking token in start final marking token in end

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The labels match the activity names and the final marking is reachable
